name: execute_symbiotic_task
description: High-level entrypoint for symbiotic TaskMaster execution via /home/nicsins/workdir/bin/task wrapper or direct. Supports compact {name; param} syntax for any registered TASK (including forged podman ones like no_proof_deployer_helper_use, full_no_proof_deploy, connect_domain etc). Orchestrates across taskmaster-mcp podman + other MCPs (godaddy, vercel_helper, no_proof) for minimal-input power: list tasks, save defs, run deploys, forge, track. Verifies symbiosis between components.

task_spec.description: Compact spec e.g. '{full_no_proof_deploy; domain=foo.com; vercel_project=bar}' or '{list_available_tasks;}' or '{connect_domain; domain=example.com}'

context.description: Optional extra context/env for the task execution

steps.description: Parse {task_name; key=val; ...} into name + params. Lookup definition from ~/.grok/tasks/<name>.json or .task.json

Use podman taskmaster-mcp:latest (registered or direct) or /task sugar to execute. Confirm via search if tools like taskmaster__list_available_tasks surfaced. Run the steps defined in the TASK json (real actions: podman calls, use_tool on helpers, file writes).
During execution, chain to other podman MCPs e.g. godaddy for DNS, no_proof_deployer_helper for deploy proof, vercel for frontend. Use search_tool + use_tool on connected (github for push) as needed.
Capture output/exit codes (must be 0 for success). Update config/tasks if dynamic. Write status to /tmp/grok_email/sent/ or GitHub issue. Assert no defects.

ties_to: /home/nicsins/workdir/bin/task (real wrapper), taskmaster-mcp podman image, all ~/.grok/tasks/*.json (new + old), add_podman_mcp, forge outputs, connect_domain.task.json, production_domain_connect.task.json
symbiotic: The glue for overall polish + issues. Powers high-level /task with new no-proof/forge capabilities. Works with register_podman_mcp to auto-surface, full_no_proof_deploy for deploys, forge_and_wire_mcp for extension. Enables explorer + storage on GitHub.
